name: Calculator
shortDescription: Simple calculator for basic arithmetic operations
fullDescription: A beautiful neumorphic calculator app that works offline. Perform basic arithmetic operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division) with an elegant interface that matches the Knitnox design language.

name: Color Calculator
shortDescription: Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL color codes
fullDescription: A beautiful color code calculator that lets you convert between different color formats (HEX, RGB, HSL). Perfect for designers and developers. Works completely offline with real-time color preview.

name: Temp Converter
shortDescription: Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin
fullDescription: A clean, offline-ready temperature converter. Type any value in Celsius, Fahrenheit, or Kelvin and all three update instantly in real time. Works as an installable PWA.
